blended.narrative: Timberline is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 19 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,282 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 34.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
